summary: All 8 changes delivered; 426 workspace tests pass; clippy clean. Key deltas: wasi:http dispatch is real (gate test with hello_component.wasm), all todo!() stubs replaced across 5 fke-* crates. Technical debt: AllowAllPolicySource is a bootstrap placeholder, Cosign lacks Fulcio chain validation, reqwest multipart not wired. Recommended next phase: p7b-kiln-production (epoch interruption, Cedar from DB, BGW publisher identity, Fulcio chain, integration tests).
